text.title: LangChain and LangGraph: Building Production AI Agents — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `langchain`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: model-workflow
step.action: Draw nodes + edges + interrupt points in mermaid.

step.name: declare-nodes
step.action: One Python function per node; declare State TypedDict + reducers.

step.name: add-checkpoint
step.action: Wire postgres/redis checkpointer; test resume after crash.

step.name: wire-interrupt
step.action: interrupt_before nodes that mutate; surface approval UI/CLI.
